title: Kakegurui
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 'Kakegurui xx' (12, eps 13-24) = 24 total. Paired with the Homura Kawamoto / Toru Naomura manga 'Kakegurui - Compulsive Gambler -' (ongoing; ~121 chapters / 20+ volumes as of 2026). The anime skips some chapters: S1 covers roughly vols 1-5 (ch 1-27) and S2 the Student Council Election arc through vol 10 (ch 28-56), after which readers resume around ch 55-57. Per-arc chapter boundaries approximate.

mappings.arc: S1: Student Council Gambles (Yumeko vs the council members)
S2 'Kakegurui xx': Student Council Election Arc
Election aftermath onward (unadapted in TV anime; manga ongoing)
